ivs.playbackkeypair.Name.Docs: Playback-key-pair name. The value does not need to be unique.

ivs.playbackkeypair.PublicKeyMaterial.Docs: The public portion of a customer-generated key pair.

ivs.playbackkeypair.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
